'''tapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:granosely|granosely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:granosely|granosely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tapate|tapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tapatesher|tapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tapatesherĂ«m|tapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tapatero|tapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tapateshĂ«|tapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tapateshĂ«m|tapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitapatero|gokitapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitapateshĂ«|gokitapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitapateshĂ«m|gokitapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotapankerom|gotapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotapankeshĂ«|gotapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotapankeshĂ«m|gotapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotapankeya|gotapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tapaterom|tapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tapatemu|tapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tapateya|tapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitapaterom|gokitapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitapatemu|gokitapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitapateya|gokitapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tapapate|tapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tapapatesher|tapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tapapatesherĂ«m|tapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tapapatero|tapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tapapateshĂ«|tapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tapapateshĂ«m|tapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitapapatero|gokitapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitapapateshĂ«|gokitapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitapapateshĂ«m|gokitapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotapapankerom|gotapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotapapankeshĂ«|gotapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotapapankeshĂ«m|gotapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotapapankeya|gotapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tapapaterom|tapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tapapatemu|tapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tapapateya|tapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitapapaterom|gokitapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitapapatemu|gokitapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitapapateya|gokitapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠte|tĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠtesher|tĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠtero|tĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠpĂŠtero|gokitĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠterom|tĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠtemu|tĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠpĂŠteya|tĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠpĂŠterom|gokitĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠpĂŠteya|gokitĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafpafte|tafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafpaftesher|tafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafpaftesherĂ«m|tafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafpaftero|tafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafpafteshĂ«|tafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafpafteshĂ«m|tafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafpaftero|gokitafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafpafteshĂ«|gokitafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafpafteshĂ«m|gokitafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafpafnkerom|gotafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafpafnkeshĂ«|gotafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafpafnkeshĂ«m|gotafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafpafnkeya|gotafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafpafterom|tafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafpaftemu|tafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafpafteya|tafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafpafterom|gokitafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafpaftemu|gokitafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafpafteya|gokitafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
